response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience and recent exposure to MCP code generators and AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq, but lacks the 8+ years of production GenAI delivery the role demands. No demonstrated RAG, vector database, multi-agent framework, or cloud-native AI system design experience on the resume. Strong engineering fundamentals and customer-facing teaching background partially offset the gap, making them a borderline candidate worth a screening call.
strengths: Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
Strong polyglot full-stack background with TypeScript, Node.js, and Python-adjacent ecosystems
Proven technical leadership through workshops, talks, and mentoring engineers
concerns: No evidence of 8+ years shipping production GenAI/AI solutions as required
Missing demonstrated experience with RAG, vector databases, or LLM evaluation pipelines
Limited major cloud platform depth (some AWS CDK only, no GCP/Azure AI services)
